release_notes:
• MAJOR: Integrated Magisk-based Patch Boot Image workflow for effortless rooting.
  • MAJOR: Added One-Click Automatic Root suite (Experimental) for streamlined dumping and patching.
  • MAJOR: Added DAT to IMG Builder for converting sparse Android DAT images to raw system images.
  • Fixed: Critical UI regressions on Dashboard and Rooting pages when maximized.
  • Fixed: Improved unpackbootimg argument handling and console log accuracy.
  • Style: Modernized scrollbar aesthetics across the entire application for a premium experience.
